meta.title: Managing China-Related Proliferation Challenges
meta.description:
Please join us for an event focusing on a recent Hudson study assessing how to improve China’s implementation of its nonproliferation commitments. Panelists include Senior Fellow Richard Weitz and Japan Chair Fellow Komei Isozaki, as well as Youngjun Kim of Korea National Defense University, Yeseul Woo of King’s College London, and Maximilian Hoell of the European Leadership Network. They will identify opportunities for limiting the growth of China’s nuclear forces, enhancing Chinese support for curbing horizontal nuclear proliferation regarding North Korea and Iran, and augmenting China’s contribution to denying non-state actors’ access to nuclear weapons.

#china #nuclear #nuclearweapons #northkorea #iran
